full_quote: Kyle was an amazing thought partner for our team when we were were in earlier exploratory stage of designing. He was able to illustrate what designing financially inclusive product looked like through past projects. He also shared his knowledge on emerging markets and broke down complex financial technology which created the foundation for our research.
name: Francis Beavers
relationship: Interviewer for project where I was a subject matter expert.
